        is_megastructure_type = quantum_catapult_3 # Quantum Catapult
    }

    # Psychic Hypersiphon Construction Site

        is_megastructure_type = psychic_hypersiphon_0 # Psychic Hypersiphon Construction Site
        is_megastructure_type = psychic_hypersiphon_1 # Psychic Hypersiphon Containment Frame
        is_megastructure_type = psychic_hypersiphon_2 # Psychic Hypersiphon

        is_megastructure_type = frameworld_decompressor_1 # Matter Decompressor Processing Ring
        is_megastructure_type = frameworld_decompressor_2 # Matter Decompressor Bore Array
    }

    # Disabled Gateway
    or = {
        is_megastructure_type = gateway_ness_ruined # Disabled Gateway
        is_megastructure_type = gateway_ness_restored # Gateway
    }


}
